LanguageData.GodHand_StasisLock.label: Stasis Lock
LanguageData.GodHand_StasisLock.description: The target's temporal phase is forcibly locked within a rift of the interference field. All vital signs and bio-currents are anchored at an absolute standstill (1%), detached from the flow of conventional time, lasting for 24 hours.
LanguageData.GodHand_ProtectionIndividual.label: Protection of God Hand
LanguageData.GodHand_ProtectionIndividual.description: Directly shielded by {1}, this individual is enveloped in a nearly invisible phase shield. Under this protection, they gain extreme defensive bonuses.
LanguageData.GodHand_TurretHeadBonus.label: Turret Fortification
LanguageData.GodHand_TurretHeadBonus.description: A turret has been welded to the head, with the metal structure reinforcing its defensive capabilities.\n\nThe turret's structural HP is proportionally distributed to the head and its sub-parts, increasing their maximum HP.
LanguageData.GodHand_IsActuallyABoat.label: Actually a Boat
LanguageData.GodHand_IsActuallyABoat.description: This unit is fixed to a boat and cannot move independently.
LanguageData.GodHand_OrificeStretchingStatus.label: Dilation Status
LanguageData.GodHand_OrificeStretchingStatus.descript: Due to prolonged exposure to extreme physical dilation, this unit's physiological structure is undergoing deep and potentially permanent reshaping.
LanguageData.GodHand_ForcedDowned.label: Pacified
LanguageData.GodHand_ForcedDowned.description: Having lost all will to resist after the interaction, this individual has completely surrendered their fighting spirit.
LanguageData.GodHand_PokedHead.label: Flicked Head
LanguageData.GodHand_PokedHead.description: The head was struck by an irresistible force, causing severe dizziness and pain.
LanguageData.GodHand_SevereHeadImpact.label: Severe Cranial Impact
LanguageData.GodHand_SevereHeadImpact.description: A violent brain concussion caused when the God Hand forcibly resurrected the corpse. While consciousness has returned, it remains extremely fragile.
